name: Italian Cream Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour three eight-inch cake pans.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks and add flour and baking soda. Add to butter mixture alternately with buttermilk. Beat well.
5. Add vanilla, sweetened coconut flakes, and chopped pecans. Mix in gently.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Fold into batter using a spatula.
7. Divide batter evenly between pans and bake for 30 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and cool in pans for 10 minutes. Turn onto cooling racks to cool completely.
9. Prepare frosting by combining all ingredients and blending until smooth and creamy.
10. When cake has completely cooled, place one layer on a serving plate and spread frosting over the top. Repeat with remaining layers.
11. Frost around the sides of the cake. Top with chopped pecans before serving.
